steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The strongest clue is the repeated phrase ‘symbolizes a close, supportive relationship’ and ‘symbolizes their support for each other’ in both Recognition and Students Aspire.

This shared emphasis on supportive relationships is the core similarity the student must highlight.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: *Recognition* and *Students Aspire* both show African American figures in poses that symbolize supportive relationships. directly uses both notes about the symbolic poses showing supportive relationships. The other three either isolate details to one sculpture or focus on irrelevant dates. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
